signals.snippet: Hello,  Since the recent changes made to my website, my clients have been able to schedule appointments outside of my business hours.  Could you please fix this issue and ensure that bookings are limited to the designated working hours only

cause_analysis.narrative: Tila MedSpa churned on 2026-04-06 after 86 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-19 via sms — 77 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 77 day(s) before churn via sms. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
